title: Fix openai.ts apiKey validation for custom+baseUrl provider
description: Bug: createOpenAIProvider (src/providers/openai.ts:7) unconditionally throws 'apiKey is required for openai provider' even when called from the provider='custom' + baseUrl path. Fix: make apiKey optional when baseUrl is provided so proxy/custom usage works without an apiKey. Acceptance: test DBB-005 (custom provider + baseUrl + no apiKey) passes without .fails() marker.
